title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Salarpuria Sattva Global Group

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Salarpuria Sattva Global Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Salarpuria Sattva Global Group are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Salarpuria Sattva Global Group:
Salarpuria Sattva Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salarpuria Sattva Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
